---
name: User workflow feedback
about: Share feedback about setup, validation, artifacts, reports, or the static demo
title: "[feedback] "
labels: "needs triage"
assignees: ""
---

## Workflow used

Describe the command or documented workflow you used.

## What worked

Which output or explanation was useful?

## What was unclear

Describe the specific setup, validation, artifact, report, or demo problem.

## Evidence

Paste a small sanitized excerpt or link to a reproduction. Do not include credentials, account identifiers, or restricted broker/vendor data.

## Expected improvement

Describe the result that would make the workflow clearer while preserving monitor-only behavior.
